description: VIF analysis on baseline 31 features, removing high multicollinearity (VIF > 10)

vif_analysis.methodology: Iterative removal of highest VIF feature until all VIF < 10

feature_configuration.note: Kept MACD_Hist (unlike Bitcoin VIF which removed it) - different multicollinearity patterns in CFG data

optuna_hyperparameter_tuning.description: Bayesian optimization on 80% tune set with VIF-reduced features

rollover_config.note: Larger step size for faster tuning

holdout_validation_5_fold.description: 5 independent runs on 20% holdout set with step_size=1

performance_analysis.conclusion: VIF filtering reduced overfitting (9.0% vs 16.8%) and IMPROVED holdout performance (56.2% vs 48.4%). This is DIFFERENT from Bitcoin where VIF didn't help.

interpretation.predictive_power: Marginal - 56.2% is slightly above random (50%) but within confidence interval
interpretation.generalization: Better than baseline - reduced overfitting and improved holdout accuracy
interpretation.vif_effectiveness: VIF filtering helped CFG (unlike Bitcoin) - suggests different feature dynamics
interpretation.statistical_significance: 95% CI [48.3%, 64.1%] overlaps with 50%, so improvement may not be statistically significant
interpretation.comparison_to_bitcoin: CFG VIF results (56.2%) better than Bitcoin VIF (50.5%) - but both still close to random
interpretation.recommendation: VIF filtering shows promise for CFG but results still inconclusive. Larger dataset or different approach needed for reliable predictions.
